🎓 Reading Level
❔ How to Play

Each round gives you a real policy challenge with four possible responses. Pick your grade level and the questions are written at that reading level. Your nation has four health bars, Happiness, Economy, Education, and Freedom, and every choice nudges them up or down. Help all your citizens to finish a term, then keep governing term after term and climb the class leaderboard.

😊Happiness

How good life feels for the people in your town. It drops when things get chaotic, run short, or feel unfair.

💰Economy

How strong jobs and money are. It reacts to taxes, rules, and how much the government spends.

📚Education

How well schools help kids learn. It rises with more choice and falls with too much top-down control.

🗽Freedom

How much people can live, speak, and work without being told what to do. Easy to lose, hard to win back.

Live example, watch Individual Freedom drop into the danger zone:
😊 Happiness
💰 Economy
📚 Education
🗽 Freedom
⚠️ DANGER. Individual Freedom below 25%! Society collapsing…
